title: Documentation Manifest
description: Schema for manifest.yml. Validates documentation manifests that serve as data maps for AI-driven documentation navigation and loading. Every package (local project, installed dependency, compiled output) uses this format.

foundation.description: Foundational documents. Loaded into AI context based on the load field.

application.description: Application-level documentation. Product architecture, design decisions, and system-level documentation.

topics.description: Topic documentation organized by technology, tool, or domain.

prompts.description: AI prompt definitions for automated tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path relative to the package root.

load.description: When to load into AI context. 'always' loads every session. 'documentation' loads only for documentation tasks.

spec.description: File path to the foundation spec, relative to the package root.

files.description: Sub-files for foundation entries, relative to the package root.

depends_on.description: IDs of entries this depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of entries that depend on this.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the application README.md, relative to the package root.

spec.description: File path to the application spec, relative to the package root.

load.description: When to load into AI context. 'always' loads every session. 'documentation' loads only for documentation tasks.

files.description: Sub-files for the application entry, relative to the package root.

depends_on.description: IDs of entries this depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of entries that depend on this.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the topic README.md, relative to the package root.

spec.description: File path to the topic spec, relative to the package root.

depends_on.description: IDs of entries this depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of entries that depend on this.

files.description: Sub-files for concordance topics, relative to the package root. Empty array for single-file topics.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the prompt README.md, relative to the package root.

depends_on.description: IDs of entries this depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of entries that depend on this.

id.description: Unique identifier across all sections. Used in depends_on and required_by.

path.description: File path to the plan README.md, relative to the package root.

plan_state.description: File path to the plan plan.yml, relative to the package root.

depends_on.description: IDs of entries this depends on.

required_by.description: IDs of entries that depend on this.
